test_cases.input: Topic: Rising use of AI tools by lawyers to draft legal documents. Publication: General-interest national magazine. No angle restrictions.
test_cases.output_summary: Generated 7 distinct angles including: the malpractice risk story (what happens when AI drafts go wrong), the access-to-justice angle (AI making legal help available to people who can't afford lawyers), a profile of a solo practitioner using AI daily, the bar association rulemaking angle, and a counterintuitive take on paralegals thriving despite AI. Each angle had specific reporting approach, pitch line, and timeframe. No angle repeated another's core question.

test_cases.input: Topic: Youth soccer participation declining in the United States. Publication: Sports magazine. Avoid: any angle focused on cost as the sole explanation.
test_cases.output_summary: Generated 7 angles including: the travel soccer club pipeline that pushes kids out early, the demographic shift in which sports kids choose, a coach shortage angle, the immigrant community angle (soccer as cultural identity vs. participation decline), and a counterintuitive 'adult recreational leagues growing' take. Correctly avoided the cost-only explanation. Pitch lines specific and ready to use. One angle (the statistical data angle) had a slightly generic reporting approach.

test_cases.input: Topic: Traditional textile crafts in rural communities under economic pressure. Publication: Literary/cultural magazine. Evergreen focus. Long-form preferred.
test_cases.output_summary: Generated 6 angles including: the inheritance story (who will learn these skills), a single-subject profile of a master craftsperson, the globalization pricing angle, a counterintuitive story about young urban artisans reviving traditions, and a philosophical/essay angle on craft as embodied knowledge. All angles suited to literary long-form. Pitch lines appropriately literary in register. The data/economic angle was less developed than others given the literary publication context — a reasonable limitation.
